_comment: CODEX role-mapping — maps GitHub actors/teams to governance roles and kernel enforcement flags.

developer.description: Standard contributor — can open PRs, run tests, request merges.

infra-operator.description: Can propose and merge infrastructure changes with Approver sign-off.

deployer.description: Can trigger production deploys. GPG optional unless global flag set.

approver.description: Senior reviewer — required sign-off for protected resource changes.

admin.description: Full access including emergency bypass and kernel configuration.
